description: Expected paths recovered by static JS bundle analysis (LAB-2108) from reference-capture.json. The capture contains one HTML page and one JS bundle with a fetch POST (body fields), an axios GET (numeric path id), and a template-literal GET (path param). Generated with --analyze-js --confidence 0.1. Param names may vary across versions; the test asserts path count + the x-vespasian-source marker, not exact names.
